description_long: This object is a realistic shrimp, displaying a slender, elongated body with a slightly curved profile. Its exoskeleton is semi-translucent with a pale beige to light brown coloration, and subtle orange hues near the head. The shrimp features a segmented body with a distinct cephalothorax and abdomen, long antennae extending from the head, and multiple thin, jointed legs beneath the body. The tail is fan-shaped and slightly darker, with visible segmentation. Small, dark eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front of the head, and the overall texture appears slightly rough and matte, typical of a fresh, uncooked shrimp.
description: A pale, semi-translucent shrimp with long antennae, jointed legs, and a segmented, slightly curved body. The exoskeleton is matte and subtly colored with beige and orange tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shrimp, highlighting the curved body, long antennae, and detailed segmentation of the tail and legs.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the symmetry of the body, the spread of the tail, and the alignment of the legs and antennae.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, but with the other flank visible, showing the same body curvature and segmentation.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the ventral side, with the legs and antennae splayed outward and the tail segments clearly visible.
